provenance.author: verify
provenance.notes: Representative clump extracted from the 'free_bamboo_set' display set (30 culms, 37834 tris): 3 full leafy bambooBlock culms (008/011/009) re-clustered into a tight grove. Source culms were authored oversized (~42m); a uniform 0.34 scale brings the grove to a realistic ~14.3m height (unit:meter normalization; geometry untouched). Ground-center pivot; 12 textures webp-compressed (5.12MB -> 2.0MB). Author handle pending verification on the staged set; credit in THIRD-PARTY-ASSETS.md.

lod.label: mesh-near+octa-far
lod.rationale: A mid-level bamboo clump reads as distinct vertical culms with alpha leaf fans up close, so the near band is the real mesh to ~100m, then it collapses to an 8x3 octahedral impostor baked from the normalized mesh (the existing octa baker captures the tall culm silhouette; a flatter lat-lon card was the original plan but octa needs no new tooling).

bands.notes: 8x3 upper-hemisphere octahedral atlas baked from the normalized bamboo-grove mesh via scripts/bake-vegetation-impostor.mjs (base-color + normal + depth).
